response.justification: The candidate has a long, broad software engineering career with staff-level titles and some recent exposure to MCP tooling and agentic workflows in the current role, which is directionally relevant. However, the role demands 8+ years of production AI delivery, explicit RAG and vector database expertise, and Python proficiency — none of which appear in this resume. TypeScript and Node.js are present but Python is entirely absent from the skills list. The AI/GenAI involvement reads as peripheral and recent rather than a core specialization, with no quantified shipped AI systems, no LLM evaluation work, and no customer-facing AI consulting experience. The candidate does not meet the minimum bar for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI Engineer.
strengths: Current role includes hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generator tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure, directly aligning with a key listed technology
Staff-level titles held at multiple companies across a long career, with AWS CDK usage and a founder track record demonstrating sustained technical seniority

History of building and shipping open-source platforms, running community workshops, and giving conference talks — consistent with the mentorship and engineering-excellence responsibilities of the role
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume; the role lists it as a primary required language alongside TypeScript
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) — the technical core of this position

The 8-year minimum for production AI delivery is not met; AI involvement appears limited to a brief, vague mention in the most recent role with no shipped AI systems, metrics, or customer outcomes cited
